mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_voucher (merchant_id, title, sub_title, rules, pay_value, actual_value, type, status) VALUES (#{merchantId}, #{title}, #{subTitle}, #{rules}, #{payValue}, #{actualValue}, #{type}, #{status})
INSERT INTO tb_seckill_voucher ( voucher_id, stock, begin_time, end_time ) VALUES ( #{voucherId}, #{stock}, #{beginTime}, #{endTime} );

insert into tb_voucher_order (id, user_id, voucher_id, pay_type, status, pay_time, use_time, refund_time) values (#{id}, #{userId}, #{voucherId}, #{payType}, #{status}, #{payTime}, #{useTime}, #{refundTime})
mapper.update: update tb_seckill_voucher set stock = stock-1 where voucher_id=#{id} and stock>0
mapper.select: select v.* , s.stock,s.begin_time,s.end_time from tb_voucher v left join tb_seckill_voucher s on v.id=s.voucher_id where v.id=#{voucherId}
select v.* , s.stock,s.begin_time,s.end_time from tb_voucher v left join tb_seckill_voucher s on v.id=s.voucher_id where merchant_id=#{merchantId}
